creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

   I agree rename net/p5-IO-INET6 to net/p5-IO-Socket-INET6.
   And these ports should modify the DEPENDS:

dns/p5-Net-DNS
irc/sirc
japanese/tiarra
mail/assp
mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin
mail/smtp-cli
net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6
net/p5-Net-INET6Glue
net/p5-Net-RTP
net/scnc
net/xbone
net/xbone-gui
net-mgmt/mrtg
net-p2p/bitflu
security/amavisd-new
security/maia

   Would submitter file another PR to rename it ?

wen
